column1: 1. For the technologies highlighted below from the assumptions spreadsheet, which scenarios are these new CTs dispatched? Are these firing natural gas or biofuels depending on the scenario? If so, are the heat rates adjusted based on the fuel source?

a. These plants were a legacy holdover from the previous phase of work and were not included in these model runs. When we pull data straight from PLEXOS, it can occasionally include power plant profiles that exist in the backend database but weren’t actually used in the model. You can ignore those.
2. For the CC plant, was there are reason the heat rate isn’t lower and adjusted for the prime mover?
3. I noticed these two technologies in the results tabs “GAS_OCGT” and “GAS_CCGT”. Do these have an associated heat rate?
a. New build Gas CCGTs have a heat rate of 7.25, Gas OCGTs have a heat rate of 10.19
